title: townsendia exscapa
intro: Townsendia exscapa, also known as exscaped Townsend's daisy or townsend's daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Townsendia exscapa include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and soothing skin irritations, making it a popular choice for treating conditions such as eczema and wounds. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve to harness its medicinal properties.
